name: @omadia/llm-provider
description: Provider-agnostic LLM contract for the omadia middleware. Defines the neutral request/response DTOs (ChatMessage content parts, ToolSpec, FinishReason, usage incl. cache tokens), the LlmProvider interface (complete/stream/classifyError + capabilities), and ships the Anthropic and OpenAI (incl. OpenAI-compatible: Mistral/Ollama/vLLM/Azure) reference adapters. Decoupling plan: docs/plans/llm-provider-interface-plan.md.
